name: Pageant Queens: Our Story Behind the Crown
original_name: Pageant Queens: Our Story Behind the Crown
overview: From Executive Producer and Director Travis Stancil, Producer and Artistic Director Michael Silas, and Producers Afflux Studios comes a groundbreaking reality series that brings long-silenced stories into the light. Before drag went mainstream, drag pageantry was its foundation, the heartbeat and backbone of an entire art form. It shaped beauty, fashion, performance, and the culture that inspired generations. Behind every crown lies resilience, sacrifice, and survival, stories that have waited far too long to be told. Pageant Queens Our Story Behind the Crown reveals the humanity behind the legend, the laughter, the loss, and the legacy of those who built this world one performance at a time.
